name: FutuRe Asia Reinsurance
description: Asian reinsurance operations across APAC markets

content.name: FutuRe Asia Reinsurance
content.description: Asian reinsurance operations covering treaty and facultative business across Asia-Pacific markets. Specializes in natural catastrophe (earthquake, typhoon), agricultural, and construction reinsurance. Headquartered in Tokyo with underwriting offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, and Sydney.
